fix_summary: Knowledge base search now uses contains-style ILIKE matching across topic, title, and content, preserving the existing API and result shape. The service tests cover mid-field matches and confirm prefix matches still succeed. Automated tests passed.
approval_reasons: The implementation directly addresses the reported prefix-only bug by changing the search pattern from `query%` to `%query%`.
Search applies consistently to all three knowledge article fields used by the endpoint: topic, title, and content.
The updated tests validate mid-string matching in multiple fields and preserve prefix-match behavior.
Automated test results passed, indicating the change is behaving correctly in the covered scope.
